prTitle: feat: implement NutritionViewModel with SwiftData persistence and macro aggregation
prBody:
## Summary

- Adds `NutritionViewModel` (`@Observable @MainActor`) as the core of the Nutrition feature module
- Exposes real-time daily macro totals (kcal, protein, carbs, fat) computed from `MealEntry` records fetched via `NutritionRepository`
- Loads per-macro targets from `UserProfile` (tdeeKcal, proteinTargetG, carbTargetG, fatTargetG) so dashboard rings can always reflect the user's goal
- Provides `kcalProgress`, `proteinProgress`, `carbProgress`, `fatProgress` fraction helpers (0–1, clamped) ready for `ProgressRingView`
- Full CRUD: `load()`, `addEntry(_:toMealType:)`, `removeEntry(_:)`, `deleteMealLog(_:)` — all backed by async/throws repository calls with `errorMessage` surfacing
- `selectedDate` property allows date navigation; `load()` re-fetches logs for the active day
- `NutritionViewModelTests.swift` covers 30+ test cases using `MockNutritionRepository` and `MockProfileRepository`: initial state, load/error paths, macro aggregation, progress fractions, date filtering, add/remove entry, and double-add guard behaviour

Closes #22
